tool_input.command:
python3 -c "
import json
with open('knowledge/guide/nablarch-patterns/nablarch-patterns-Nablarchでの非同期処理.json') as f:
    d = json.load(f)
print('content:', d.get('content', '')[:2000])
for s in d.get('sections', []):
    print('section', s['id'], ':', s.get('title',''), '-', s.get('content','')[:500])
"
tool_input.description: Read async processing pattern document content
